nasb.text: For there is a testing; and what if even the rod which despises will be no more?” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: For it will not be a testing—what could it do if you despise the rod?” declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 因為考驗必要來到，你為甚麼要藐視那管教的杖呢？這事必不得成功。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 这刀必试验他们，这刀所鄙视的权杖若不复存在，怎么办呢？这是主耶和华说的。’
